title: Better Falling Block Particles
description: A simple mod that makes falling blocks emit particles, similar to block breaking particles, when floating or when on a non-full block.
body:
# Better Falling Block Particles 
**NOTE: The functionality of this mod has been merged into my other mod, [Particle Interactions](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-interactions) as of v0.10. This mod won't recieve any further updates**

This is a simple mod that makes falling blocks emit particles, similar to block breaking particles, when floating or when on a non-full block (such as iron bars or buttons).
Most properties of the particles can be changed via the config such as their lifespan and spawn chance.

This mod is fully client-side and will do nothing if installed server-side.

## Config

The config can be edited in-game if you have ModMenu installed. You can also edit the config file manually, it can be found in `<minecraft folder>/config/falling_block_particles.properties`. Be careful! Incorrect values may cause crashes!

This is my first time making a mod with a config so if you find any issues, please report them on the github issue tracker!
